since_last: 67% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +7.34%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.11% · BTC -4.10% · Gold -3.05% · Nasdaq100 +2.64%. 67% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +7.34%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +7.34%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +13.87%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +13.87%, SMR +11.99%, INTC +11.14%, KLAC +10.47%, SMCI +10.42%. Laggards: INOD -7.85%, IBM -4.31%, WDAY -4.03%, MGNI -2.74%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.60% at $188.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
